title: Delicate Crisp Vietnamese Tofu Bun Cha
description: A romantic Vietnamese dish featuring crispy tofu and fresh herbs, served in a copper pot with 00-flour ssam wraps

ingredients.name: extra-firm tofu
ingredients.notes: drained and cut into small cubes

ingredients.name: fresh herbs
ingredients.notes: such as mint, basil, and cilantro

instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit
In a shallow dish, mix together the 00-flour and cornstarch
Toss the tofu cubes in the flour mixture to coat
Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat
Add the coated tofu to the skillet and cook until crispy and golden brown
In a small bowl, whisk together the lime juice, soy sauce, and maple syrup
Pour the sauce over the crispy tofu and toss to coat
Arrange the ssam wraps in the copper pot
Add the crispy tofu and fresh herbs to the copper pot
